texto: I feel like I am a real artist and I want to be able to feel what I am singing about. So when I sing, 'Leave (Get Out),' I have been through that. I think it is just a new generation, whether people are ready for it or not. Teenagers are dating.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a JoJo: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “I feel like I am a real artist and I want to be able to feel what I am singing about. So when I s…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, i-am, artist pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de artist e people.

texto: I'm lucky to have a great support system in my friends and some of my family. If you have those people that you trust, go ahead and fall back into them and let them be your hammock and cocoon and let them embrace you.
